Order online

Online services — fixed price, done for you.

Pick the service you need, tell us the details, and pay securely online. Each service is a fixed once-off fee — no surprises.

CIPC / Company secretarial

Company registration (Pty) Ltd

Register a new private company with CIPC — name reservation, MOI and registration certificate.

R990 incl. VAT 3–5 business days
Start → CIPC / Company secretarial

Company deregistration

Fully deregister a company or close corporation with CIPC and SARS.

R3 500 incl. VAT Typically 4–6 months
Start → Tax & SARS

VAT deregistration

Cancel an existing VAT registration with SARS.

R2 875 incl. VAT Minimum 21 working days
Start → Tax & SARS

Link Registered Representative with SARS

Register or update the Registered Representative (public officer) on a taxpayer’s SARS profile.

R990 incl. VAT Minimum 21 working days
Start →
